d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Peggy summons [[2]] royal guards to join the fray. The royal guards inherit [[120%]] of Peggy's HP and [[50%]] of her ATK. If Peggy is defeated, all royal guards immediately leave the battlefield.
Active. Peggy blows her horn, instantly healing all remaining royal guards for an amount equal to their max HP. If there are fewer than [[2]] guards remaining, she summons a new royal guard to the battlefield. Peggy then orders these royal guards to protect all allies for [[12]]s. During this time, [[70%]] of the damage taken by all allies is shared evenly among the guards, while the guards' own HP loss is reduced by [[75%]].
The royal guards inherit [[130%]] of Peggy's HP and [[55%]] of her ATK.
The royal guards inherit [[140%]] of Peggy's HP and [[60%]] of her ATK.
The royal guards inherit [[150%]] of Peggy's HP and [[65%]] of her ATK.
The royal guards inherit [[160%]] of Peggy's HP and [[70%]] of her ATK.
Peggy opens a magic scroll, healing all of her remaining royal guards and [[2]] other [[weakest]] allies for Peggy's [[150%]]<ATK> HP per second for [[8]]s.
Increases the HP restored per second to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases the HP restored per second to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases the HP restored per second to [[180%]]<ATK>.

Peggy summons a royal marksman in the backline to assist in battle. The marksman inherits [[100%]] of Peggy's ATK and fires [[3]] volleys of armor-piercing arrows, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to [[2]] [[frontmost]] enemies. Enemies hit by the armor-piercing arrows take [[22%]] more [[ranged damage]] for the next [[5]]s. During this time, allied summons' [[ranged damage]] against the affected enemies is increased by an extra [[14%]].

The extra [[ranged damage]] dealt to enemies hit by armor-piercing arrows is increased to [[23%]]. For allied summons, their additional [[ranged damage]] against these enemies is increased to [[16%]].

The extra [[ranged damage]] dealt to enemies hit by armor-piercing arrows is increased to [[24%]]. For allied summons, their additional [[ranged damage]] against these enemies is increased to [[18%]].

The extra [[ranged damage]] dealt to enemies hit by armor-piercing arrows is increased to [[25%]]. For allied summons, their additional [[ranged damage]] against these enemies is increased to [[20%]].
Increases Haste by [[10]]. If 2 royal guards are on the battlefield, further increases Haste by [[5]].
Increases Haste by [[12]]. If 2 royal guards are on the battlefield, further increases Haste by [[8]].
Increases Haste by [[15]]. If 2 royal guards are on the battlefield, further increases Haste by [[10]].

The royal guards can alternate between normal attacks and royal sword moves while Princess' Rally is active, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within [[1]] tile and gaining a permanent shield equal to [[80%]] of the actual damage dealt.
Increases the damage dealt by royal sword moves to [[240%]]<ATK>.
The royal guards gain a [[1]]-tile glory aura. All other allies within the aura deal [[30%]] more [[melee damage]]; this [[melee damage]] bonus is increased by an extra [[25%]] for allied summons.
Increases the damage dealt by royal sword moves to [[280%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: When [[3]] or more allied summons from different allies are alive at the same time, all allied summons gain ATK equal to [[30%]] of Peggy's initial ATK, and Phys & Magic DEF equal to [[40%]] of Peggy's initial Phys & Magic DEF.
